TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Cikadaan = Gaga mniq Taytung Cangpinsyang ka alang Cikadaan. 51 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 124 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 83% niqan 103 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 17% niqan 21 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis65%, Bunun10%, Tayal1%, Paiwan2%, Truku2%, ni rahuq na o4%.
S.PHON: = ʦikadaan = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ʦaŋpinsjaŋ ka alaŋ ʦikadaan. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, bunun**%, tajal*%, paiwan*%, tɾuku*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Cikadaan = Gaga mniq Taytung Cangpinsyang ka alang Cikadaan. 51 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 124 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 83% niqan 103 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 17% niqan 21 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis65%, Bunun10%, Tayal1%, Paiwan2%, Truku2%, ni rahuq na o4%.
S.PHON: = ʦikadaan = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ʦaŋpinsjaŋ ka alaŋ ʦikadaan. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, bunun**%, tajal*%, paiwan*%, tɾuku*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
